name: Gingham OS Oblong Dec Pillow Khaki/Ivory - Threshold™: Cotton Rectangle Lumbar Support, Indoor Use
description:
Elevate your living space with this Traditional Gingham Decorative Oblong Pillow from Threshold™. This oblong decorative pillow features a traditional gingham pattern for a classic look that blends effortlessly with any decor style. Defined by its oversize oblong shape, the decorative pillow has a soft cotton shell with a polyester filled interior to provide comfortable support as you lean back after a tiring day.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
